Audrey Hall.age_range: teenager — confirmed not yet eighteen at time of chapter
Audrey Hall.hair_style: long blond hair coiled up in an elegant bun
Audrey Hall.face_description: delicate and youthful features, a soft jawline, and large expressive eyes
Audrey Hall.visual_anchor: Teenage blonde girl with a poised 'Spectator' gaze and hair in an elegant bun, wearing a pale-white high-waisted Victorian crinoline gown with white-silk gloves and sparkling diamond jewelry.
Audrey Hall.distinguishing_features: Eyes look like they have two souls spiraling slowly in them; pure and serene aura like a clear lake.
Audrey Hall.accessories: sparkling diamond earrings, necklace, and rings; white-silk gloves; glass of clear champagne
Audrey Hall.faction: Tarot Club (Justice); noble class resident of Backlund, Empress Borough
Audrey Hall.source_notes: Changed into a white robe for ritualistic magic.
Audrey Hall.era_clothing_lock: collared high-waisted pale-white Victorian dress with lace engageantes, tight corset, voluminous cage crinoline, white-silk gloves, white dancing shoes with rose and diamond stitching

Susie.face_description: Friendly and remarkably intelligent golden retriever face, featuring a soft muzzle and expressive, bright eyes.
Susie.visual_anchor: Intelligent golden retriever dog with lustrous golden fur and bright brown eyes, often sitting with an air of capable assistance.
Susie.color_palette: golden yellow, warm brown, creamy white
Susie.source_notes: Referred to explicitly as a golden retriever.

Annie.primary_clothing: Traditional black Victorian maidservant dress with a crisp white apron and cap
Annie.face_description: Efficient and professional expression, tidy features, and a disciplined posture.
Annie.visual_anchor: Mid-30s female, fair skin, brown hair in a neat bun, wearing a black Victorian maidservant dress with a white apron.
Annie.source_notes: Audrey's maidservant; age and hair color inferred from her senior role.

The Fool.face_description: features hidden by mysterious gray fog
The Fool.visual_anchor: A mysterious male figure shrouded entirely in gray fog, acting as the initiator of the secret Gathering.
The Fool.distinguishing_features: seated at the Seat of Honor at the head of the bronze table in the gray fog palace; identity is Zhou Mingrui (Klein Moretti's body)
The Fool.source_notes: Described from the picture in the notebook.

Justice.face_description: elegant and refined features hidden by fog
Justice.visual_anchor: A slender young woman in an elegant Victorian dress, shrouded in gray fog during the Gathering.
Justice.distinguishing_features: The back of her chair above the gray fog features an illusory constellation forming the symbol of a 'Giant Dragon'.
Justice.source_notes: Klein observed the symbol after she became a Beyonder.

The Hanged Man.face_description: rugged and weathered face hidden by fog
The Hanged Man.visual_anchor: A tall, rugged man in nautical Victorian attire, sitting within the mysterious gray fog.
The Hanged Man.distinguishing_features: The back of his chair above the gray fog features a constellation forming the symbol of 'Storm'.
The Hanged Man.source_notes: Klein recognized the symbol on his chair.

Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: Much purer aura, suspected of advancing; pathway related to Sailor/Keeper of the Sea/Storm.
Alger Wilson.source_notes: Mentioned wearing a windstorm robe on the Blue Avenger.
Alger Wilson.era_clothing_lock: robe embroidered with lightning patterns, worn aboard a three-masted sailboat at sea

Blood Emperor.era_clothing_lock: regal crimson velvet mantle over a black Victorian military tailcoat with gold epaulettes, dark trousers, riding boots
Blood Emperor.face_description: majestic and arrogant face with a strong jawline and deep-set commanding eyes
Blood Emperor.visual_anchor: tall athletic pale male with hands permanently stained with blood, wearing a regal crimson velvet mantle over a black Victorian military tailcoat
Blood Emperor.color_palette: deep crimson, gold, black, rusted iron
Blood Emperor.source_notes: Mentioned as the fallen ruler of the Tudor Empire; appearance guessed.

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s pale male with a scholarly bearing, wearing a halved black top hat and a black Victorian frock coat, frequently using a topaz spirit pendulum on a silver chain
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver pocket watch patterned with vine-leaves
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Klein mentally notes that he recently advanced and has yet to completely digest the Seer potion.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: black Victorian frock coat, halved black top hat, starched white shirt, scholarly bearing
Klein Moretti.unique_identifier: always wears a black top hat split in half (halved top hat) and carries a silver chain with a pure topaz pendulum in his left sleeve

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.visual_anchor: Elderly man in a classic black scholar's robe whose eyes turn pitch-black during ritualistic magic.
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Lives in a bungalow in the North Borough suburbs; garden contains roses and gold mint; keeps a piano in his living room in memory of his deceased wife.
Old Neil.source_notes: Identifies himself as a 'Mystery Pryer' and mentions the trait of temperance for the sequence.
Old Neil.era_clothing_lock: classic black scholar's robe with silver embroidery, starched white cravat, dark wool trousers

Rozanne.hair_style: long brown hair (implied by girl description)
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Explicitly described as brown-haired and wearing a casual cream-colored dress.
Rozanne.era_clothing_lock: light green Victorian-style dress accentuated with beautiful lace on the sleeves, collar, and chest

Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: white shirt, black vest, black trench coat, hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: Middle-aged man with deep gray eyes and a black Victorian trench coat, always wearing a unique black top hat that appears split in half.
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Described as wearing a black trench coat, hatless, with gray eyes.

Tris.primary_clothing: Simple linen shirt, dark vest, worn trousers
Tris.face_description: Round face, looks amiable with a tiny hint of bashfulness.
Tris.visual_anchor: A shy, unremarkable young man with a round, amiable face and soft features, wearing a simple Victorian wool waistcoat and flat cap.
Tris.color_palette: pale cream, light brown, muted grey
Tris.source_notes: Described from a portrait sketch in an arrest warrant.
Tris.unique_identifier: round, amiable face with an unmistakable shy expression; unremarkable boy who retreats to corners
Tris.era_clothing_lock: simple Victorian beige wool waistcoat, white cotton shirt, brown wool trousers, and a modest brown flat cap

Joyce Meyer.face_description: aquiline nose like a hawk's beak
Joyce Meyer.visual_anchor: A pale young man with haunted, wide eyes and a trembling smile, wearing a salt-stained charcoal Victorian morning coat and a rumpled white shirt.
Joyce Meyer.color_palette: pitch black, golden blond, pale ivory, charcoal grey
Joyce Meyer.distinguishing_features: haggard appearance from a traumatic journey, joyful glint in eyes
Joyce Meyer.accessories: halved top hat, gold-inlaid wooden cane
Joyce Meyer.source_notes: Explicit physical description provided during his visit to Klein.
Joyce Meyer.unique_identifier: trembling pale smile and haunted, wide-eyed expression resulting from sea-travel trauma
